title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Star Bazaar Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Star Bazaar Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Star Bazaar Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Bazaar Global Group:
Star Bazaar Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar Global Group!
